name: vision-distillation
description: Compress large vision models into compact ones through knowledge distillation where a teacher trains a student to mimic its representations.
keywords: knowledge distillation, vision models, model compression, teacher-student learning, efficient models
content:
## Knowledge Distillation for Vision Models

Student models learn from teacher representations rather than labels, capturing patterns more efficiently.

### Core Concept

Student models learn from teacher representations rather than labels, capturing patterns more efficiently. This enables efficient model development and deployment.
